title: heterogonium subaequale
intro: Heterogonium subaequale is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heterogonium subaequale include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Heterogonium subaequale include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, soups, and other remedies for various health concerns.
